info.title: Verso.Cli
info.description: Command-line tool for the Verso interactive notebook platform.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Verso CLI — execute, serve, and convert Verso notebooks.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Execute a notebook headlessly and stream cell outputs.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Display Verso CLI version, runtime, and extension information.

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Launch the Verso Blazor application as a local web server.

arguments.name: notebook
arguments.description: Optional notebook to open on startup.

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to the source notebook file.
